# @labpics/motion 0.3.0

> Zero-dependency headless motion: закрытая форма пружины, compositor-путь
> (WAAPI + CSS linear()), build-time компилятор. Все единицы времени в
> публичных опциях — МИЛЛИСЕКУНДЫ, если явно не сказано «секунды».

## Быстрый выбор входа

- Типовая DOM-анимация одной строкой → @labpics/motion/animate (animate(el, { x: 240, opacity: 1 }))
- Минимальный вес, native WAAPI, to-only → @labpics/motion/nano
- Статические вызовы без runtime-цены → плагин @labpics/motion/compiler/vite
- Пружина из ощущений: fromBounce({ duration, bounce }) → @labpics/motion/spring
- Каскады → @labpics/motion/stagger; жесты с инерцией → @labpics/motion/gestures

## Субпути

- @labpics/motion — Ядро `.` — MotionValue, drive и корневой экспорт
  exports: MotionParamError, MotionValue, drive, spring, tween, validateSpringParams, validateSpringPhysics
  docs: docs/reference/core.md
- @labpics/motion/easing — кривые изинга
  exports: anticipate, backIn, backInOut, backOut, bounce, circIn, circInOut, circOut, cubicBezier, easeIn, easeInOut, easeOut, elastic, expoIn, expoInOut, expoOut, linear, normalizeEasing, power, sineIn, sineInOut, sineOut, steps
  docs: docs/reference/easing.md
- @labpics/motion/react — Фреймворк-адаптеры — ./react, ./vue, ./svelte, ./solid, ./preact, ./angular, ./lit, ./wc, ./qwik
  exports: useMotionStyle, useMotionValue, useReducedMotion, useSpring
  docs: docs/reference/adapters.md
- @labpics/motion/svelte — Фреймворк-адаптеры — ./react, ./vue, ./svelte, ./solid, ./preact, ./angular, ./lit, ./wc, ./qwik
  exports: springStore
  docs: docs/reference/adapters.md
- @labpics/motion/vue — Фреймворк-адаптеры — ./react, ./vue, ./svelte, ./solid, ./preact, ./angular, ./lit, ./wc, ./qwik
  exports: useMotionValue, useSpring, vMotion
  docs: docs/reference/adapters.md
- @labpics/motion/value — парсинг и интерполяция CSS-значений, transform
  exports: buildTransform, hslToRgb, interpolate, interpolateColor, interpolateTransform, interpolateUnit, mixColor, parse, parseColor, parseUnit, rgbToHsl
  docs: docs/reference/value.md
- @labpics/motion/driver — ./driver и ./frame — управляемый драйвер и общий кадровый цикл
  exports: createDriver
  docs: docs/reference/driver-frame.md
- @labpics/motion/stagger — каскады задержек
  exports: stagger
  docs: docs/reference/stagger.md
- @labpics/motion/timeline — ./timeline и ./keyframes — секвенции и семплеры keyframes
  exports: createTimeline
  docs: docs/reference/timeline-keyframes.md
- @labpics/motion/keyframes — ./timeline и ./keyframes — секвенции и семплеры keyframes
  exports: keyframes, sampleKeyframes
  docs: docs/reference/timeline-keyframes.md
- @labpics/motion/decay — инерционное затухание
  exports: createDecay
  docs: docs/reference/decay.md
- @labpics/motion/lit — Фреймворк-адаптеры — ./react, ./vue, ./svelte, ./solid, ./preact, ./angular, ./lit, ./wc, ./qwik
  exports: LAB_MOTION_SPRING_TAG, LabMotionSpringElement, MotionController
  docs: docs/reference/adapters.md
- @labpics/motion/gestures — drag с инерцией и handoff
  exports: createDrag, createHover, createPan, createPress, createVelocityTracker
  docs: docs/reference/gestures.md
- @labpics/motion/scroll — ./scroll и ./in-view — скролл-привязка и появление во вьюпорте
  exports: createInView, createScrollObserver, createScrollVelocity, resolveTargetProgress, scrollProgress, scrubBinding
  docs: docs/reference/scroll-in-view.md
- @labpics/motion/in-view — ./scroll и ./in-view — скролл-привязка и появление во вьюпорте
  exports: MotionParamError, inView
  docs: docs/reference/scroll-in-view.md
- @labpics/motion/presence — mount/unmount переходы (enter/exit lifecycle)
  exports: createPresence, swapPresence
  docs: docs/reference/presence.md
- @labpics/motion/flip — FLIP layout-анимации
  exports: computeFlip, correctRadius, counterScale, createFlip, flipAt
  docs: docs/reference/flip.md
- @labpics/motion/projection — проекционное дерево (вложенный FLIP)
  exports: cornerRadiusAt, createDomProjection, createProjection, createProjector, mixBox, projectAt
  docs: docs/reference/projection.md
- @labpics/motion/smart — умные переходы
  exports: SMART_KEY_ATTR, captureSmart, resolveSmartTier, smartTransition
  docs: docs/reference/smart.md
- @labpics/motion/svg — ./svg и ./svg-morph — SVG-анимации и морфинг
  exports: createMotionPath, drawPath, parsePath, pathLength
  docs: docs/reference/svg.md
- @labpics/motion/a11y — политика reduced-motion
  exports: createMotionConfig
  docs: docs/reference/a11y.md
- @labpics/motion/spring — точная пружина: параметры, конструкторы, easing
  exports: fromBounce, fromOscillation, fromPeak, fromVisualDuration, springAsEasing, springPresets
  docs: docs/reference/spring.md
- @labpics/motion/waapi — ./compositor, ./compositor/stagger и ./waapi — compositor-путь и WAAPI
  exports: animateWaapi, compileWaapi, easingToLinear, supportsWaapi
  docs: docs/reference/compositor.md
- @labpics/motion/auto — автоматические переходы (zero-config FLIP)
  exports: autoAnimate, enterKeyframes, exitKeyframes, moveKeyframes, planAuto
  docs: docs/reference/auto.md
- @labpics/motion/svg-morph — ./svg и ./svg-morph — SVG-анимации и морфинг
  exports: interpolatePath
  docs: docs/reference/svg.md
- @labpics/motion/solid — Фреймворк-адаптеры — ./react, ./vue, ./svelte, ./solid, ./preact, ./angular, ./lit, ./wc, ./qwik
  exports: createMotionValue, createSpring
  docs: docs/reference/adapters.md
- @labpics/motion/preact — Фреймворк-адаптеры — ./react, ./vue, ./svelte, ./solid, ./preact, ./angular, ./lit, ./wc, ./qwik
  exports: useMotionValue, useSpring
  docs: docs/reference/adapters.md
- @labpics/motion/angular — Фреймворк-адаптеры — ./react, ./vue, ./svelte, ./solid, ./preact, ./angular, ./lit, ./wc, ./qwik
  exports: injectMotionValue, injectSpring
  docs: docs/reference/adapters.md
- @labpics/motion/wc — Фреймворк-адаптеры — ./react, ./vue, ./svelte, ./solid, ./preact, ./angular, ./lit, ./wc, ./qwik
  exports: LAB_SPRING_TAG, createLabSpringElementClass, defineLabSpring, renderTemplateValue
  docs: docs/reference/adapters.md
- @labpics/motion/qwik — Фреймворк-адаптеры — ./react, ./vue, ./svelte, ./solid, ./preact, ./angular, ./lit, ./wc, ./qwik
  exports: useSpring
  docs: docs/reference/adapters.md
- @labpics/motion/frame — ./driver и ./frame — управляемый драйвер и общий кадровый цикл
  exports: asRequestFrame, createFrameLoop, frame
  docs: docs/reference/driver-frame.md
- @labpics/motion/presets — ./tokens и ./presets — токены движения и пресеты
  exports: blink, bounceY, breathe, compilePreset, drawOn, drift, fadeSlide, formatNumber, pop, presetToWaapi, presetTotalDuration, pulse, runNumber, runPreset, runScramble, runTypewriter, samplePreset, scrambleAt, spin, splitText, tickerCells, typewriterAt, wiggle
  docs: docs/reference/tokens-presets.md
- @labpics/motion/utils — скалярные примитивы
  exports: clamp, interpolate, mapRange, mix, pipe, snap, wrap
  docs: docs/reference/utils.md
- @labpics/motion/compositor — ./compositor, ./compositor/stagger и ./waapi — compositor-путь и WAAPI
  exports: CompositorSpring, DEFAULT_TOLERANCE, compileSpringLinear, compileSpringPlan, createSpringLinearCache, handoffToLive, readCompositorSpring, resolveCompositorTier, supportsCompositor, supportsLinearEasing
  docs: docs/reference/compositor.md
- @labpics/motion/compositor/stagger — ./compositor, ./compositor/stagger и ./waapi — compositor-путь и WAAPI
  exports: CompositorSpring, CompositorStaggerGroup, compileSpringPlan, compileStaggerPlan
  docs: docs/reference/compositor.md
- @labpics/motion/tokens — ./tokens и ./presets — токены движения и пресеты
  exports: distanceScale, distanceScaleConfig, duration, easing, spring, springFromDurationBounce, staggerGap
  docs: docs/reference/tokens-presets.md
- @labpics/motion/animate — одно-строчный DOM-фасад
  exports: animate
  docs: docs/reference/animate.md
- @labpics/motion/nano — минимальный WAAPI-вход
  exports: animate
  docs: docs/reference/nano.md
- @labpics/motion/compiler/vite — build-time lowering: Vite-плагин и рантайм артефактов
  exports: motionCompiler
  docs: docs/reference/compiler.md
- @labpics/motion/compiler/runtime — build-time lowering: Vite-плагин и рантайм артефактов
  exports: animateCompiled
  docs: docs/reference/compiler.md
- @labpics/motion/behaviors — headless-машины мобильных взаимодействий
  exports: createBottomSheet, createCarousel, createDragDismiss, createPullToRefresh
  docs: docs/reference/behaviors.md

## Дальше

- Ошибки LMxxx: docs/errors.md
- Методология размера/бенчей: docs/benchmark.md
- Быстрый старт: docs/getting-started.md
